untranslatable_reason: The Bullish Breakaway pattern requires precise five-candle pattern recognition with gap detection between specific candles and closing price validation within that gap. This multi-candle pattern with inter-candle gap logic cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. Indicators needed: candle_count, gap_detection(candle[1], candle[2]), gap_size, and gap_close_within(candle[5], gap). These pattern-specific validators are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Pattern requires: (1) identification of 5-candle sequence, (2) detection of downtrend prior to pattern, (3) first candle is large bearish candle, (4) gap between candle 1 and 2 (body-to-body), (5) candle 5 closes within the gap created by candles 1-2. This is a classic candlestick pattern recognition task that exceeds the capability of single-bar technical indicators.
